allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''''fs''''\); const d = fs.readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\); const p = JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "console.log\(''Archwing count:'', require\(''./src/data/Archwing.json''\).length\); console.log\(''ArchGun count:'', require\(''./src/data/ArchGun.json''\).length\); console.log\(''ArchMelee count:'', require\(''./src/data/ArchMelee.json''\).length\); console.log\(''Pets count:'', require\(''./src/data/Pets.json''\).length\); console.log\(''Sentinels count:'', require\(''./src/data/Sentinels.json''\).length\); console.log\(''SentinelWeapons count:'', require\(''./src/data/SentinelWeapons.json''\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const w = require\(''./src/data/Warframes.json''\); const necramechs = w.filter\(x => x.productCategory === ''MechSuits''\); console.log\(''Necramechs:'', necramechs.length, necramechs.map\(n => n.name\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const w = require\(''./src/data/Warframes.json''\); console.log\(''Sample:'', JSON.stringify\(w[0], null, 2\).substring\(0, 500\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const w = require\(''./src/data/Warframes.json''\); const filtered = w.filter\(x => x.name && \(x.name.includes\(''Voidrig''\) || x.name.includes\(''Bonewidow''\) || x.uniqueName && x.uniqueName.includes\(''Mech''\)\)\); console.log\(''Found:'', filtered.length, filtered.map\(f => f.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./src/data/Warframes.json''\); const mechs = d.filter\(w => w.name && \(w.name.includes\(''Voidrig''\) || w.name.includes\(''Bonewidow''\)\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(mechs.map\(m => \({name: m.name, uniqueName: m.uniqueName, category: m.category, productCategory: m.productCategory}\)\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./node_modules/warframe-items/data/json/Misc.json''\); const kd = d.filter\(i => i.name && \(i.name.includes\(''K-Drive''\) || i.name.includes\(''Bondi''\) || i.name.includes\(''Flatbelly''\) || i.category === ''K-Drives''\)\); console.log\(kd.length, kd.map\(k => k.name\).slice\(0, 10\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./src/data/Mods.json''\); const sets = new Map\(\); d.filter\(m => m.modSet\).forEach\(m => { if \(!sets.has\(m.modSet\)\) sets.set\(m.modSet, []\); sets.get\(m.modSet\).push\(m.name\); }\); for \(const [set, mods] of sets\) console.log\(set + '': '' + mods.join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./src/data/Mods.json''\); const sets = new Map\(\); d.filter\(m => m.modSet\).forEach\(m => { const name = m.modSet.match\(/Sets\\/\([^/]+\)\\//\)?.[1] || m.modSet; if \(!sets.has\(name\)\) sets.set\(name, []\); sets.get\(name\).push\(m.name\); }\); for \(const [set, mods] of [...sets].sort\(\(a,b\) => a[0].localeCompare\(b[0]\)\)\) console.log\(set + '' \('' + mods.length + ''\): '' + mods.join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./src/data/Mods.json''\); const g = d.filter\(m => m.name.startsWith\(''Galvanized''\)\); g.forEach\(m => console.log\(m.name, ''|'', m.type, ''|'', m.levelStats?.[0]?.stats?.[0]?.substring\(0,80\), ''...'', m.levelStats?.[m.levelStats.length-1]?.stats?.[0]?.substring\(0,80\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./src/data/Arcanes.json''\); const a = d[1]; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({name: a.name, type: a.type, rarity: a.rarity, levelStats: a.levelStats}, null, 2\)\)")
